name: AI Image Analysis Pipeline
description: Built a serverless AI pipeline using Lambda, Bedrock, SQS, and Step Functions to extract structured metadata from millions of property listing images that previously had none.

name: Akamai to CloudFront Migration
description: Delivered a major CDN migration, translating complex multi-environment Akamai configurations into reusable Terraform modules, enabling teams to self-manage their own CDN for the first time.

name: IAM Identity Centre Migration
description: Migrated IAM users to AWS IAM Identity Centre, centralising SSO and permission sets across multiple accounts, eliminating static access keys, and implementing TEAM for time-limited privilege escalation.

name: Veeam AWS Automation
description: Built an automated Veeam for AWS platform to standardise backup appliances across AWS environments, with reusable OIDC Terraform modules for secure access.

name: 1Password SCIM Bridge
description: Designed and deployed a 1Password SCIM bridge on ECS Fargate to automate group provisioning from Active Directory.

name: Home Assistant Add-on
description: Custom Home Assistant add-on for home automation and integration.

name: Home Lab Infrastructure
description: Personal home lab environment managed with Ansible for experimentation and learning.
